## 来源说明

以下证据来自海外科技访谈/深度讨论类播客 RSS。只允许依据标题、节目、发布日期、链接和节目简介写作；不得编造嘉宾、 transcript、观点或未提供的事实。

## 候选播客清单

### 1. Building Reliable AI Developer Platforms

- 节目：Latent Space
- 来源：Latent Space
- 发布日期：2099-01-02
- 链接：https://example.com/podcast/dev-platforms
- 简介：An interview with a platform engineering lead about AI coding agents, eval suites, release safety, code review bottlenecks, and how developer infrastructure teams redesign workflows when machine-generated pull requests become common.

### 2. Data Centers, Energy, and the AI Infrastructure Stack

- 节目：No Priors
- 来源：Conviction
- 发布日期：2099-01-02
- 链接：https://example.com/podcast/ai-infra-energy
- 简介：A discussion with an infrastructure founder about AI data centers, power constraints, networking, model serving economics, and why the next phase of AI competition depends on energy, cooling, deployment speed, and capital coordination.

### 3. Enterprise AI Workflows After the Agent Boom

- 节目：Decoder
- 来源：The Verge
- 发布日期：2099-01-01
- 链接：https://example.com/podcast/enterprise-ai-workflows
- 简介：A CEO interview about enterprise AI adoption, workflow orchestration, permission boundaries, auditability, reliability, and why large organizations need AI systems that fit existing processes instead of only impressive demos.

## 写作边界

- 这是播客笔记，不是新闻快讯。需要写成长文中文笔记，直接按每期节目独立小节展开，不要额外生成总览或播客清单。
- 若简介没有明确嘉宾姓名，嘉宾字段写“未标明”，不要猜。
- 不要生成投资建议、产品购买建议或夸张标题。
